comment: Zincblende SiGe (a = 5.545 A Vegard), psl kjpaw Si + dn-kjpaw Ge, PBE, 45/240 Ry, 4x4x4, nr 40^3 pinned (glide-commensurate). QE 7.5 on asus, 2026-07-14. ph.x Gamma DFPT, tr2_ph 1e-16, no NAC. gradwave: analytic Hessian via postscf/uspp_position.hessian_column (one SCF + six response solves).
